mapper.insert: INSERT INTO allocations (order_id, batch_order_id, allocated_qty, allocated_price, gross_amount, fee, tax, net_amount) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{batchOrderId}, #{allocatedQty}, #{allocatedPrice}, #{grossAmount}, #{fee}, #{tax}, #{netAmount})
mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, SUM(gross_amount) AS amount FROM allocations WHERE order_id IN #{id} GROUP BY order_id
